channel.title: Steamdeck on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Steamdeck on linuxrepos

item.title: Hardest Game to Play on Steamdeck
item.description: Most games work great on Steamdeck, but Final Fantasy XI is one that doesn’t. It requires dotnet, injection of 3rd party tool, and other modifications to make it playable.

item.title: Steamdeck as a Desktop
item.description: No, do NOT modify the system. This guide shows you how to retain the system while adding package management and the things you need to make the steamdeck your desktop!
